languages.text: "Надеюсь, он помог своему роду добиться величия лучше, чем это выходит у меня". {n}Лария улыбается уголком рта.{/n}
"I hope he helped his house achieve greatness more successfully than I have." {n}Laria smiles with the corner of her mouth.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Надеюсь, он помог своему роду добиться величия лучше, чем это выходит у меня". {n}Лария улыбается уголком рта.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "I hope he helped his house achieve greatness more successfully than I have." {n}Laria smiles with the corner of her mouth.{/n}
"I hope he helped his house achieve greatness more successfully than I have." {n}Laria smiles with the corner of her mouth.{/n}
"I hope he helped his house achieve greatness more successfully than I have." {n}Laria smiles with the corner of her mouth.{/n}

languages.text: “但愿他比我更有本事，可以光耀他家族的门楣。”{n}菈丽雅勾了勾嘴角，露出一抹淡淡的笑。{/n}
languages.original_text: "I hope he helped his house achieve greatness more successfully than I have." {n}Laria smiles with the corner of her mouth.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “但愿他比我更有本事，可以光耀他家族的门楣。”{n}菈丽雅勾了勾嘴角，露出一抹淡淡的笑。{/n}

languages.text: « J'espère qu'il a contribué à la grandeur de sa maison mieux que je n'ai su le faire. » {n}Laria esquisse un pâle sourire.{/n}
languages.original_text: "I hope he helped his house achieve greatness more successfully than I have." {n}Laria smiles with the corner of her mouth.{/n}

traits.locale_text: « J'espère qu'il a contribué à la grandeur de sa maison mieux que je n'ai su le faire. » {n}Laria esquisse un pâle sourire.{/n}

languages.text: "Umarım hanesinin yüceliğe kavuşmasına benden çok yardımı dokunmuştur." {n}Laria, ağzının kenarıyla gülümsüyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: "I hope he helped his house achieve greatness more successfully than I have." {n}Laria smiles with the corner of her mouth.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Umarım hanesinin yüceliğe kavuşmasına benden çok yardımı dokunmuştur." {n}Laria, ağzının kenarıyla gülümsüyor.{/n}

languages.text: «Espero que ayudara a su casa a conseguir la gloria mejor de lo que lo hice yo». {n}Laria sonríe con la comisura de sus labios.{/n}
languages.original_text: "I hope he helped his house achieve greatness more successfully than I have." {n}Laria smiles with the corner of her mouth.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «Espero que ayudara a su casa a conseguir la gloria mejor de lo que lo hice yo». {n}Laria sonríe con la comisura de sus labios.{/n}

languages.text: "Ich hoffe, er hat seinem Haus mit größerem Erfolg geholfen als ich." {n}Laria verzieht den Mundwinkel zu einem Lächeln.{/n}
languages.original_text: "I hope he helped his house achieve greatness more successfully than I have." {n}Laria smiles with the corner of her mouth.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Ich hoffe, er hat seinem Haus mit größerem Erfolg geholfen als ich." {n}Laria verzieht den Mundwinkel zu einem Lächeln.{/n}

languages.text: 「彼に、私のように成功して、家全体を偉大に導いてほしい」{n}、ラリアは口角を上げて微笑む。{/n}
